texto: As in diamonds so in batting, perfection requires flawlessness and nowhere is a batting imperfection more quickly recognised than in the dropped catch. For this reason any innings worthy of consideration deserves to have all its flaws studied to establish whether or not it is the genuine gem or just masquerading as one under the glitter of big hitting or weight of runs.
explicacao: Citação de Patrick Ferriday sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “As in diamonds so in batting, perfection requires flawlessness and nowhere is a batting imperfect…” articula autoestima, batting, cricket em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como cricket e diamonds.
